title: H-A2 breakeven-aware train-only revised rule preregistration
purpose: Pre-register a revised H-A2 rule family after H-A2.60 showed that directionally correct ORB candidates can still lose when the selected debit vertical does not reach the long strike or overcome implementable friction.

wiki_basis.use: Mid PnL is a benchmark only; implementable PnL and cost drag must govern rule interpretation.
Strike gap changes debit, delta, win rate, and breakeven behavior; the revised H-A2 rule must explicitly model strike reachability.
Raw ORB direction is not enough; debit spreads require filters and real option-chain validation.
Conditional 0DTE rules must use information available by the decision timestamp and avoid lookahead leakage.

revised_research_question: Can H-A2 identify SPY 0DTE ORB debit vertical candidates whose decision-time state makes a cost-adjusted strike-reachability target plausible, rather than merely predicting underlying direction?

revised_hypothesis.claim: The current H-A2 locked condition should be replaced by a breakeven-aware conditional continuation hypothesis before more exact replay expansion.
revised_hypothesis.mechanism_target: The underlying must move far enough after entry for the selected vertical to approach or exceed the long strike and overcome debit, bid/ask spread, and per-leg fees before forced close.
revised_hypothesis.why_this_is_not_more_filter_piling: The revision changes the research target from direction-only classification to payoff feasibility. It does not add protective policies after seeing losses; it requires the option payoff geometry and implementable friction to be modeled before a trade can be considered plausible.

rule_family_to_preregister.base_strategy: Sub-System A SPY 0DTE ORB directional debit vertical spread

candidate_rule_dimensions.description: Measure whether the selected long strike is reachable enough for the debit vertical to overcome cost. This target is evaluated in training diagnostics but cannot be used as a live input unless it is predicted from decision-time variables.
Use entry quote-derived debit, bid/ask width, and fee assumptions to reject trades where friction dominates plausible payoff.
Use only the 09:30-09:35 ET range and breakout state available at decision time to represent early momentum strength.
Use macro/VIX/calendar labels as context, not as a replacement for strike reachability and cost feasibility.
Record all candidate rule trials, forbid OOS tuning, and use DSR or an explicit DSR blocker if selecting a best trial.

planned_next_diagnostic.goal: Use existing local artifacts only to define and stress-test a train-only breakeven-aware H-A2 revised rule candidate before any OOS rule selection or paid data expansion.
allowed_data_scope: existing exact replay autopsy as mechanism sanity check
entry-time quote and strike metadata already present in local artifacts where available
required_outputs: Decision-time feature list and explicit future/leakage exclusion list.
Train-only candidate rule trial table with complete search log.
Mid PnL versus implementable PnL interpretation rules.
Decision: park H-A2, preregister OOS evaluation of a single locked rule, or write targeted data/regime expansion plan.
Explicit statement that this diagnostic cannot claim E2 or paper-trading readiness.
forbidden_outputs: No threshold chosen from OOS results.
No live LLM or GDELT call.

sample_and_data_policy.future_paid_data_condition: Allowed only after the train-only diagnostic names a specific inference or regime gap that cannot be resolved from local artifacts.
must_report_if_later_expanded: active trade count after each filter

allowed_claims: H-A2.61 pre-registers a breakeven-aware train-only revised rule family.
The revision separates future payoff targets from decision-time inputs to avoid lookahead leakage.
No paid data, exact replay expansion, E2 claim, or paper trading is approved.
forbidden_claims: Do not claim H-A2 edge is validated.
Do not claim H-A2 is fully falsified as a broad strategy family.
Do not claim the breakeven-aware rule is selected for trading.
Do not approve exact replay expansion.
Do not change threshold 0.001 as a tradable rule.
Do not select an OOS filter.
Do not approve paper trading, operational validation, or real-money trading.
Do not claim E2 acceptance-grade evidence.
completion_criteria: The artifact cites H-A2.60 as the controlling mechanism audit.
The revised hypothesis distinguishes payoff feasibility from direction prediction.
Allowed decision-time inputs and forbidden future inputs are explicit.
Search-log, DSR, chronological split, MinTRL/PSR, and big-day controls are required.
Paid data, exact replay expansion, OOS filter selection, paper trading, and E2 claims are forbidden.
tier_blockers: No OOS evaluation of a locked revised rule
next_safe_action: Run H-A2.62 `h_a2_breakeven_aware_rule_train_diagnostic` as a local/no-paid/train-only E1 diagnostic using existing artifacts only.
